entry.title: New: CR 24-120 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending the following: 1. FIRST READING of Bill 171, CD1 (2024), to amend the Project District ordinance for Kīhei-Mākena Project District 9 (Wailea 670) for about 670 acres identified for real property tax purposes as tax map keys (2) 2-1-008:056 and 071; 2. FIRST READING of Bill 172, CD1 (2024), to amend various Conditions of Zoning in Ordinance 3554, as amended by Ordinance 4849, relating to Kīhei-Mākena Project District 9 (Wailea 670) zoning (Conditional Zoning); and 3. RECORDATION of the Unilateral Agreement.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
